arts.ttl: Papers: Ashworth top of Arsenal list to replace Edu after leaving Man Utd
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Man Utd open to Rashford bids - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United are open to offers for Marcus Rashford, Arsenal are considering Dusan Vlahovic, and Virgil van Dijk rejects Liverpool's contract offer.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson intervenes as INEOS narrowly avoid another major Man Utd blunder
arts.sum: Manchester United have scored many PR own goals since Sir Jim Ratcliffe and INEOS took over in February - and they had Sir Alex Ferguson to thank for avoiding another

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer brutally snubs return offer after opening door to Man Utd
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer hasn't managed a team since being sacked by Manchester United in November 2021, although the former striker is open to returning to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: AZ Alkmaar knock Manchester United out the UEFA Youth League
arts.sum: AZ Alkmaar’s U19 side have progressed to the next round of the UEFA Youth League after a 0-0 draw at Manchester United on Tuesday. AZ progresses 2-1 on aggregate. After a 2-1 win in the first leg in Alkmaar, AZ went into the game with Jayden Addai in their starting eleven. The best chances in […] The post AZ Alkmaar knock Manchester United out the UEFA Youth League appeared first on Football Oranje.

arts.ttl: Manchester United's history-making player must be close to January transfer window exit
arts.sum: Man Utd U19s drew 0-0 against AZ Alkmaar in the UEFA Youth League, which meant they exited the competition.

Ziro has confirmed the transfer on his Instagram account and expressed his delight at having linked up with 'the biggest club in the world.' He wrote: "Firstly, I would like to thank my family for all their love, support and encouragement throughout the years. Despite the significant upheaval at Man Utd in recent times, the club continues to rigidly pursue Sir Jim Ratcliffe's new transfer policy aimed at snapping up the brightest young talents in English football.

arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: Why Amorim's perfect for cash-strapped Man Utd
arts.sum: Speaking on the Transfer Talk podcast, Sam Tighe explains how Manchester United’s lack of budget is less of a concern given the track record of Ruben Amorim at improving players and ‘fitting square pegs in round holes’.

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe sent clear Man Utd message after Dan Ashworth exit - 'Have to stop'
arts.sum: Manchester United's transfer business will be the source of much intrigue following Dan Ashworth's exit and Ruben Amorim's arrival at Old Trafford ahead of the January window

arts.ttl: Preview: Viktoria Plzen vs. Manchester United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Viktoria Plzen and Manchester United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
